title: lithospermum apulum
intro: Lithospermum apulum, also known as Apulian gromwell, is a perennial plant species in the borage family native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lithospermum apulum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit immunomodulatory effects. Lithospermum apulum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for various uses in traditional medicine and herbal remedies.
